title: Senior Data Engineer
bullets: Led design and delivery of mission applications; one nominated for a SOCOM innovation award.
Engineered cross-domain data pipelines enabling instantaneous movement across red and yellow enclaves.
Partnered with stakeholders to translate mission requirements into technical backlogs, clarify acceptance criteria, and align delivery schedules.

title: Lead Data Engineer
bullets: Built an open-source data platform on Hadoop and Spark to ingest and manage multi-terabyte datasets.
Developed multiple web applications, deploying on Kubernetes in a secure cloud enclave for scalable and resilient access.

title: Senior Data Scientist
bullets: Led a team in developing and maintaining a UI/API.
Developed various stochastic related ML models to assist in decision making.
Prototyped a MLOps pipeline that connected with a UI / API.
Utilized spaCy to perform event extraction from text data.
Prototyped information theory based approach to anomaly detection.
Led department intern program for summer of 2022.

title: Intermediate Data Scientist
company: MITRE Corporation • McLean, Virginia, United States
bullets: Created optimization engine to assist in privacy preserving contact tracing.
Used Spark to preprocess large scale IP features and make ML based enrichments.
Leveraged Spark to leverage geospatial data and perform anomaly detection.
Experimented with various graph theory based/ML approaches to create a new method for graph structure similarity.
Contributed to backend API supporting front end Vue application.
Generated documentation with Sphinx/GitLab CI/CD.

title: Associate Software Developer
company: MITRE Corporation • McLean, Virginia, United States
bullets: Developed AI/ML based solutions to COVID privacy preserving contact tracing efforts.
Implemented pipelines for experimenting/deploying ML models.
Applied continuous integration for repos.
Generated docs using Sphinx and other auto-generating forms.

title: Software Solutions Engineering Intern
bullets: Wrote SQL functions to help in reducing datasets efficiently.
Created and trained a model to help embed geospatial data into n-dimensional space.
Performed clustering in conjunction with trained embeddings to help predict similar entities.
Wrote packages to help manipulate dataframes to speed up embeddings.
Documented code to help future employees in usage.

title: Data Analyst
bullets: Collected data to be used by the team.
Created a series of programs to be used in analyzing information.
Led team of 5 analysts to create reports for coaching staff.
